overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk game, walking along elevated rooftops and narrow corridors in a neon-lit dystopian city at night. The player moves through a mix of open panoramic city views with towering holographic advertisements and dark, claustrophobic metal walkways.

large industrial support column with yellow and black stripes
rusted corrugated metal roofing forming the walking surface
cluster of satellite dishes and antennas on the rooftop
metal bridge structure connecting buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: Standing on an elevated rooftop walkway with a panoramic view of towering neon-lit skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The camera moves forward along corrugated metal roofing, passing satellite dishes and industrial support pillars while overlooking the vast dystopian cityscape.

segments.scene_description: Moving into a narrow enclosed corridor with corrugated metal walls and a metal railing. A large holographic billboard reading 'WET DREAM' dominates the far end. The player passes NPCs standing and walking in the tight space as the open sky disappears from view and the environment becomes more industrial and confined.

descending stairs and turning corner toward red-lit area

segments.scene_description: Descending through a dark narrow corridor with trash piles along the walls and minimal lighting. The environment shifts to dim and moody as the player moves deeper into the structure, descending stairs and turning corners with corrugated metal walls creating a claustrophobic atmosphere.

neon city lights become visible again as camera turns toward skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated path overlooking red-lit structure with city skyline in background

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark corridor onto an elevated walkway with a view of a distinctive red-lit structure below. The neon skyscrapers reappear in the background as the player moves along the metal walkway, with corrugated rooftops lining the path and the city skyline visible ahead.

events.description: continuing along walkway with panoramic city skyline prominent ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow elevated walkway with neon cityscape visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the narrow elevated walkway with corrugated metal shacks on one side and the vast neon-lit city skyline visible ahead. The red-lit structure falls behind as the player progresses toward the towering holographic advertisements, with the elevated bridge structure becoming more prominent in the mid-ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an expansive, neon-lit rooftop panorama into a claustrophobic industrial interior before emerging back into the open city skyline. It begins by gliding along corrugated metal roofing past satellite dishes and industrial pillars, overlooking a vast dystopian cityscape of towering holographic advertisements. As the camera moves forward, the open sky disappears and the environment tightens into a narrow enclosed corridor where the player passes NPCs beneath a dominant holographic billboard reading WET DREAM. The scene then shifts into a dim, moody descent through dark corridors filled with trash piles and corrugated walls, creating a sense of confinement before the camera turns a corner and emerges onto another elevated walkway. Finally, the view opens up again to reveal a distinctive red-lit structure below and the distant, glowing skyscrapers as the camera progresses along a bridge lined with metal shacks toward the towering city center.
